angles.argument: Cancer rates have risen in the same years that 5G rollout started in many countries
search_queries: cancer incidence rates trend last 5 years

angles.argument: My uncle who lives near a 5G tower was diagnosed with cancer last year
One study showed increased tumors in rats exposed to radiation like 5G frequencies
If 5G is safe, why do birds drop dead near new 5G towers in some places?
Countries without 5G have lower cancer rates than those rushing to deploy it
Once 5G is everywhere, it'll lead to mandatory implants and total cancer epidemic
What about all the firefighters reporting headaches and cancer after 5G antennas went up nearby?
Cell phone radiation is basically the same as 5G and causes brain cancer in heavy users
search_queries: cell phone radiation brain cancer studies
